reviews.review_description: I’ve been thinking about buying this for a while and finally did. It’s so well done. Fun, immersive mechanics and great sound design with cool music. 100 percent recommended.

...besides the real thing. I'm totally in love with this game. Never wrote a review before but simply need to spread how amazing it is!

Ignore the bad ratings based on crashing issues that obviously have been fixed. Never happened to me. 

Be sure to activate "Full Edge Control" to add more realism and more precise control. Then only you can actually control the carving with wrist motions by adjusting the pressure of your feet to your toes or heals.

Sadly the developers seem to have abandoned the game, which is a shame because this could be pure gold. It is actually pretty polished but could easily be so much better. 

Should they reconsider, here are my suggestions to the developers for an even better experience:

* The height of the controllers could easily increase the pressure of your feet by lowering them. Would make a huge difference. Front controller down -> more speed.
 
* Jumps somekinda feel like based on moon gravity physics. Feels overall to arcady. Your body should have more weight to encounter this issue. Landings would also benefit of the added weight resulting in feeling more heavy.

* The tracks should have different variations based on day time or weather conditions. For example: The tracks Descent and Tempest are way too foggy. That's a sad waste of potentially great tracks.

* The elephant in the room: A Multiplayer Mode

* And of course: More tracks

Bugs still in the game:
* In Ghost Mode: Wrong times in the cabin and when you finish a race against a ghost and retry, the ghost is gone. You're alone on the track and have to go back to the cabin to select it again which is annoying.

Major downside of the game: The music is unbelievably awful. It also still plays despite lowering the volume to zero in the options.
A simple fix for this issue: Go to the radio in the cabin, delete every song in the custom playlist and finally enjoy the wonderful acoustic atmosphere of the mountain. 

The performance of the game actually doesn't need that kinda heavy fogging as mentioned to keep up the framerate. You can crank the game up to the double of the resolution and it runs smooth as F on 90 Hz. On 150% of the resolution you can set it to 120 Hz. 
(Quest 3 owner with QGO)
This game is so good! Please add more maps developer and especially a better freestyle map, like a full on terrain park full of jumps, rails, and super long features. This game is so amazing.
Great game massively recommended

I really enjoy the snowboarding, after a while, I enabled the full edge control in options and this really threw a curve making the game very interesting. I love being able to switch between both stances while riding down the mountain and looking at everything, even stopping to gaze before continuing the ride down is incredible! The new Nightline map is an awesome addition.

Here’s a few things that would be amazing for future updates:

•Chair Lift option to go back to the top of the map.

•Better training option with a menu to show list of all moves and their grab positions. Player can choose the move they want to focus on. Player can select the training map in the cabin with all other map options.

•2-4 Multiplayer mode, the players will be seated on a floating lift and can descend when ready using a button. The players are blue ghost versions of the red race ghost with their visible gear shown.

Edit: thanks developers for replying.

To developers:

Can you give us the option to choose any version of the game to download.

I tried every existing snowboard app, and Carve is the most detailed: the starting lodge with doggo is beautiful, every snowboard you unlock has its stats, and you find also gloves and tapes (songs for your playlist) while exploring. 
It's a little more arcadey of all the other apps, because when doing tricks only the board spins, but it's perfect against motion sickness!
If you want some gameplay:
https://youtu.be/QkWrvXeCQIY
Hi I love the game but today I was playing and it did not work like I was in the bored and I even uninstalled it and reinstalled it but it was the same but over all the game I really fun

Hi I love carve snowboarding but can u add more game modes like races against people and like just on a random slope with no end exept for if you quit because I want to play with my friends and just go down the slope also another good idea for a game is hot potato your in a dome and some one has the potato and u can get boosted 

5 stars

reviews.review_title: It's a great feeling to ride
reviews.review_description:
The more I played the more I liked the game. It's not perfect, some elements are simplistic. When you restart the run the game forgets about the ghost etc.

What's important is the snowboarding model and all related to it feels really cool once you get the hang of it. It allows you to have a godlike slides between trees with deadly precision.

It's better than other snowboards on Quest I tried. I only play time attack but there is a trick mode too.

The maps are cool to ride, full of verticality and interesting situations. Sometimes you have to slow down or approach specific turns with some plan in mind.

The boards actually feel different and make  a big difference if they are good for soft or hard snow, the handling etc. It's worth retrying different paths with different boards. That soft snow shortcut might be a great option sith the right board.

The music playlist is a fun mini game.

I wish there were more maps but who wouldn't xD

OMG yall did a great job..Its beyond expectations..Back in the day if it was too dark to play outside then this was one of the games me and my friends could play splitscreen with .Almost there guys...I'm having issues with with the freestyle mode though.. After performing the trick and seeing the game confirm that I did the FS 360( or w/e it's called) I'm not being awarded the medal at the end like i was when completing the 10m grind and after the 6th time of completing but not succeeding I'm getting annoyed..Lucky for yall though you made a kicka** game or I wouldn't even bother with this review...Someone please Bless me with the know how so I can give this masterpiece the 5 stars it deserves .TY AND GODBLESS

Love this game so fun! No lag on quest 2 and very cool, you can collect cool things along the way and I love Freestyle mode. During summer I play this because I can not snowboard. Motion sickness isn’t bad from someone who tends to get it. Diffrent slopes are so cool and I love the tricks. Rails are super fun and cool to grind and in all it feels so real. Powder even blasts when stopping and carving! I recommend this game to any owners of a VR headset!
Pretty difficult to use controls and boring gameplay. Jumping was especially hard. Graphics didn't impress. Was disappointed since I wanted to play an immersive 3D snowboarding game.

Love this game so far. Feels super similar to the real thing. 
Only.... the dog in the cabin is so zombie freaky. Creeps me out so much lol. Please fix that 🙏 ❤️

Thanks!

I unlocked all the levels mostly with time trials and it needs more fun coursesto add on! The freestyle levels are way too hard. The controllers don’t always respond the way you want them to and I can barely add enough points to unlock the next level. Luckily I got enough good snowboards to get fast enough that I was able to unlock all the levels without depending on the freestyle levels.

So the game is amazing I like how there’s like a cabin function I played this other game called slowp since everyone was hyping it up it was awful no idea how that game has better rating this game is amazing easy tutorial took me like 10 minutes to figure it out fully I like how their different items u can unlock when ur going down the slopes and the drops are sick literally. Amazing

reviews.review_title: 1080 for VR now show me SSX
reviews.review_description:
The two best games growing up floating on snow has to be 1080 and SSX tricky. I never remembered getting so much exercise when playing this older games but a few slopes of carve and after some funny noises and missed rails you feel like you’ve actually been out snowboarding the only issue so far is those pesky rock traps learn to get the item before a sudden turn or find yourself just jumping in a corner somewhere adding to your points but definitely not your ego. 

Peace

reviews.review_title: Devs didnt play their own game
reviews.review_description:
Unless you have the Quest Pro controllers do not play this!
The Quest is amazing but it’s biggest fault is that it cant see your hands behind you, almost everyone who has ever used one knows that, these devs chose to make a game entirely on having your hands behind you, it’s awful, snowboard constantly does crazy things because your hand keeps glitching around.
Very dissapointed.

Has the makings of a fun game but the problem is to do tricks you need to grab you board in specific spots and the tracking makes this impossible. Some feel like they want you to grab behind you which is impossible to track. You board wants to spin when you try so good luck hitting that sweet spot. When advancement relies on points and tricks this make progression impossible. Then when your flailing at your board certain that should count it still doesn't register as a trick.

Lost another star because the freestyle course is too difficult. With the above mentioned limitations you also don't have nearly enough time to get even halfway to point total for lowest medal. Most the time you get to bottom with 30sec to spare. I'm doing constant tricks for what im able an I get maybe 5000 points for a needed 15000 points for the lowest needed amount. What kind of monster do you think I have to be to progress here!

reviews.review_title: Really really good but one issue
reviews.review_description: Please please please add multiplayer. I’m kind of getting sad because I like slope but I kind of think this game is really better so can you pweeeeeeeeeeeeeees make it multiplayer please please pretty pretty pretty pretty pretty pretty pretty pretty pretty pretty please please please please please please please please please please please I want multiplayer really bad please🥺 five stars⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

4 stars because the leaderboards don't work properly. only shows your position, doesn't display your user name, and doesn't let you load other users times or ghosts. 5 stars if they fix it & let us see the full leaderboard. be nice to get some new levels. Fun game though.

Nice graphics, mellow sound track, and otherwise very neat experience.

However, the board is not locked to your playspace, it spins freely underneath you, following your controllers. Plus the game doesn't turn you as you wind down the mountain, and there's no way to artificially turn either. You have to physically step and turn your entire body, to keep your feet aligned to the board, and to keep facing downhill. Even in seated mode.

This means the game is unplayable in any forward-facing set up, because you'll be facing sideways half of the time, with your neck and arms both twisted over to the other side, just trying to get the board aligned to the slope. 

If you can step and rotate constantly (and if you don't mind doing that in a game where your feet are supposed to be strapped into a board) then it's a decent experience. But if you're playing in a small playspace with your back to a wall, or playing seated, it's a bad time.

This is the second year running where I've tried to get into this game in the winter, and found it unplayable both times.

This game could really benefit from an artificial turn option, and ideally one that keeps the playspace aligned with the board, so you can put your feet on the board and keep them there (and not have to physically turn in the playspace just to keep facing the direction of travel).

Good game on all other points, but this one critical mechanic has a significant issue with it that makes it incompatible with my playspace.

Please consider adding this board locking option.
360 all day music is alright.recommend
5 stars this is a good game I love snowboarding good job
Continues the lineage of 1080 Snowboarding. The physics feel great in this one too. Fun regardless of what your objective is.
Fun , easy type game with calorie moderate /high calorie burning .

This game is a vibe. It teleported me back to my carefree years. Ultra kudos to the dev for the utmost intuitive controls. If you’ve had a run in the backcountry in real life, stop reading and buy this now.

And on a final note. „Seated” mode in this game is a charm and give couchsurfing a whole new meaning:D
This game is very fun and comfortable to play,

Seriously 2022 where did the developers go :'(.

Lack of support for a good game.

reviews.review_title: The first game I decided to refund.
reviews.review_description:
I got 15 minutes to play in test mode and it was awful at first. But... I read some reviews and I decided to buy it, I thought that maybe I am the problem.

I played for around next 30 minutes. I learned the basics, learn how to grind and make basic tricks like Tailgrab or Cannonball. Rotation also isn't a problem for me. It give me a little more of entertainment, but...

...not a lot, game still looks cheap, terrain model/textures are not stable, tutorial is poor, snowboard is unintuitive placed in front of the foots (it's not aligned with them). At first my snowboard runs proper, but after second run of the game it's stared working weird (turning to the left, which hasn't occur in previous tries)

Best part in this game so far is cabin interactions, but it's fun for 5 minutes. Game worth at it's most 10$. Really bad product for 20$.

I love this game, when I was looking for a skiing/snowboarding game on vr this came up and I was thrilled and bought it, so worth it, so many maps, boards it’s great but then I thought how cool would it be if there was a surfing game so I believe you can use the same mechanics on the boards you just have to design waves. If you can make a surfing vr game I would buy it for 40$ within SECONDS. That would be the best vr game ever!

reviews.review_title: One of the most frustrating vr games
reviews.review_description:
I am REALLY TRYING to enjoy this game, but the enthusiasm is just that difficult for me to drudge up. 

So whenever I try to play a game, I want to try to unlock everything in advance so I can fully get a feel for everything that the game has to offer. As I am writing this review, I have the night line level unlocked and the only way to keep progressing is I need to get 2 medals in the night line level. 

So the game gives you two options of medals you could collect, you could either do timed challenges where you have to get to the goal before a certain time frame, or you could do freestyle mode where you can try to get 10,000 points or do certain tricks, (key word, try). Sometimes you could do both. 

Here's where the problems begin, you could try to do the time attack challenges but the game doesn't give you any tips on how to go faster AT ALL. So you would try to do the freestyle challenges. In order to do any tricks, your best bet is to raise your arms with the index triggers held and your board will spin around doing a BP 100 or BP360 and so fourth depending on how long you can hold it for until you land on the ground correctly... The spinning board only works whenever it feels like, just like the quest pro controller tracking. 

So ok, I have been trying to rack up as many points as possible, and because the board chooses whenever it feels like functioning, I decided to go for the other medal in the night line level, do a rusty trombone. This should be easy since it's just one trick. The problem is, the game doesn't tell you how to do ANY of the tricks, so I go into the option where it "tells you" how to do the tricks. So you are thrown into a level and on the left side it shows your board and it tells you "do a BP 360" this is not a bad one considering that this is the only trick I could do, considering that it's the only cut and dry thing I can do aside from grabbing my boaifor no real reason. Then it tells you to do a Lein drop. You have to grab the back right side of the board. It doesn't tell you which side to land on, it doesn't tell you how to do anything other than the part you're supposed to grab. So I can't have the game tell me how to do a rusty trombone, or anything, and on top of that, you are trying to grab a part of the board and 80% of the time your hand doesn't grab the part of the board you want and then all of a sudden you run into a tree or a rock and snow gets in your face. And when you ARE grabbing the part of the board and when you are about to jump, you don't even care about the level you just want to know how to get the positioning right, you are stopped in your tracks because there's a level right in your face. 

I wish the tutorials on how to do tricks were not so vague, I wish that there is a cut and dry way to gain speed and I wish the game would TELL you how to gain speed, and I wish that everything wasn't so vague.

Good game and it used to play just fine.

Now though it displays rectangles of corrupted graphics all through. This makes it unplayable. Fix this bug and it could be a good game.

I can’t even play for five minutes without incredible nausea. I even bought some sea bands because I really wanted to get into this game. The bands didn’t do anything. On top of that, the game seems to be centered around doing tricks and getting points. That’s not what I was looking for anyhow.
Not as great as it sounds wish it tracked my feet I am a good snow boarder in Alaska and this doesn’t feel like snowboarding

(Update December 2024/DEVS: WHY AREN'T THERE DLCS FOR ME TO BUY?! I'M BEGGING TO GIVE YOU MY CASH FOR NEW MOUNTAINS TO SNOWBOARD... BUT NOTHING. This game is so great... and for the players that love it, you guys should offer us new opportunities to bug out on. I seriously CANNOT believe that nothing was ever added to this game!!! It's still great... but many people want MUCH MORE.)  Original review: This (and SWARM) are the two games I play constantly. The replayability is off the charts... because you can consistently try to beat your last time. (I don't even play the freestyle mode!) In addition, you can snowboard a course a bunch of times before you realize there's an entirely different route you can take to shave off seconds. It's truly a great game. I just wish it had better music! Yikes.  Seriously, if they released new courses I would be psyched! Psyched, I say!!! PLEASE RELEASE NEW COURSES! Ahh!!! (I'd happily pay for them. Well, not "happily"... but "easily", for sure!)

reviews.review_title: The rendering is too glitchy to enjoy...
reviews.review_description: ...I can see the edges of the screen being glitchy. I wanted to like it, but the foveated rendering or whatever is really sloppy. And now "Meta" changed their returns policy and it is super difficult. I think I am just going to burn the stupid Quest in a bonefire.
Mom
Pet the dog.   Love the dog.  Cuddle the dog.  Make dog happy.   Dog.

It's been now 23 years since 1080 came out, and I have been waiting for a 1080 #2 release since then...and WOW, the devs finally delivered. Carve is the best sports game period. I have been playing non-stop since yesterday and I keep getting better after each slope run. I am a good snowborder in real life, but because of covid, all my snow trip got cancelled. I havent gone boarding for 2 years now, but with Carve, I feel I am back on the slope again, ridding my goofy style board again. Thank you so much Devs for bringing me back to the slope again in amazingly great fashion. I adored 1080 and I am simply in love with Carve. Please keep updading this wonderful game regularely as it is now my top favorite game of all time again. HAPPY HAPPY HAPPY HAPPY!!!!! :):):)

Update: Devs, please ADD MULTIPLAYER MODE. I need to challenge other players by racing down the mountain just like 1080 did. I beat the game and now find there is little to NO replay value. This is 2021, multiplayer mode IS A MUST HAVE!!!!!! PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE, it shouldnd be too hard to add.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review..  we are looking to the possibility of adding multi-player but in the meantime you can actually compete with other friend's ghost data using the RACE button from the course select menu.

reviews.review_description: Really like this game. It seems to be crashing in freestyle mode.. Hope it is fixed soon,, otherwise I will be seeking a refund
